$comment: Single source of truth for the build-time backlog. Exactly one feature may be `in_progress` at a time — enforced by `.claude/init.sh`. Status: queued | in_progress | done. Add new features at the bottom; do not renumber.

features.title: Project scaffold
features.summary: Repo skeleton: settings, Docker, Postgres, custom User, owner-scoped manager, empty apps, .claude/ harness, docs.

features.title: Exercise catalogue (seed + custom)
features.summary: Land MuscleGroup, Equipment, Exercise (with nullable owner), ExerciseAlternative. Data migration loads seeds/exercises.yaml. Admin CRUD.

features.title: Routines + WeeklySplit
features.summary: Routine, RoutineDay, RoutineExercise, WeeklySplit. Owner-scoped. Admin + minimal user-facing list/create.

features.title: Workout session with interactive set checklist
features.summary: WorkoutSession, ExerciseLog, SetLog with completed_at. HTMX tap-to-complete checklist; Alpine.js rest timer.

features.title: PR auto-detection + manual override
features.summary: PersonalRecord model; signal/service that updates PRs when a SetLog is completed; PR list + edit views.

features.title: Body metric snapshots
features.summary: UserMetricSnapshot model + admin + simple chart/list. Profile edit form for height & DOB.

features.title: Dashboard: today / week / history / PR highlights
features.summary: Replace the Phase 0 placeholder with real cards driven by routines + sessions + PRs.

features.title: Session live editing (add exercise/set on the fly + custom exercise)
features.summary: During an in-progress workout: pick or add a custom exercise mid-session, add another set to any exercise, delete sets/exercises. HTMX endpoints.

features.title: User-facing routine CRUD
features.summary: List/create/edit/delete routines + days + exercises in the UI, not just /admin/.

features.title: Routine generator from split + muscle groups
features.summary: Pick a split preset (PPL, Upper/Lower, Bro Split, Full Body) or a custom muscle-group plan; service generates RoutineDays + exercises balancing compound/isolation per training_style.

features.title: Progression service (linear + double progression)
features.summary: DeterministicLinearProgression (powerlifting) and DeterministicDoubleProgression (bodybuilding/powerbuilding). recommend_next() wired into start_session so every working set is pre-filled with weight×reps from the last completed session.

features.title: Substitution service multi-factor scoring
features.summary: Rank exercise alternatives by muscle overlap, equipment availability, and fatigue. Currently returns unranked list.

features.title: Warm-up set generation
features.summary: Auto-prepend is_warmup=True SetLogs based on working-set load (e.g. 50%×5, 70%×3, 85%×1 before top sets).

features.title: Monthly goals
features.summary: MonthlyGoal model (volume / frequency / weight targets). Dashboard card showing progress toward goal.
